title: 後日譚③　～つぶれ被害、増加中～

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Idiot... Are you dreaming about the concert?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You two, it looks like they've brought out dessert. Although, Ticket
already seems to be out of fuel.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll just go grab some cake for the three of us. Taishin, please continue
to keep an eye on Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, will do... I swear, Ticket. You're like a preschooler, running
around till you fall asleep...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Hey! Wake up! Get off of me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there... What are two youngins like yourselves doing sighing at a
party? Or, are you having another "dreamland" moment?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Exactly that... Being able to sing with you, Teio, and even Rudolf! It
still doesn't feel real.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
More than that, it was a lot of fun! Again... I wish to do it again and
again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The stage lights were so, so bright, if you ask me, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I figure so long as we keep running in races, we'll be able to go up
there countless times.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
What?! Nature is gonna sing with Satono and the others again! Not
fair, not fair! I wanna sing with them too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: So do I... That's why we'll have to keep running too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, that's right! Okay, then, let's charge forward!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What's gotten into you all of a sudden?! That hurts! Oof!
